preflight_backlog_trend.verdict: GREEN — well below all PROP-030 alerting tiers. open_issues_total=15 is in the 'completely healthy' band (info tier triggers at WoW growth >5%; moderate triggers at >200 or >10% WoW; we are nowhere near). Net velocity +112 over 7d shows decider is closing well above intake. The age_ge_14d=7 (out of 15) reflects a small cohort of long-running issues that haven't been closed; oldest_open is freshly-created (0.03 days = ~50 minutes) so the open lane is actively churning.
preflight_backlog_trend.baby_and_verify_drain_zero: baby_drain_count_7d=0 and verify_drain_count_7d=0 — neither agent (analyst-baby, curmudgeon-verify) has produced completed/consolidated work in the last 7 days per the tracked criteria. May indicate (a) nothing in the queue matched their scope this week, or (b) the agents fired but tracker/review entries weren't tagged correctly. NOT actionable from this run; flagging for next Mode 3 to investigate.

PROP-016 Mech A convention: decider strands when its commit includes NEVER_PUSH files; operator applies via own-clone-with-direct-push and tombstones the sentinel.
findings.action_recommended: Operator review and apply the two strands; tombstone with `tombstone_status='applied'` once done. Not blocking; informational signal that the strand-rescue queue is backlogged 2 deep.
